name: Bug report
about: A finding looks wrong, or actlint behaves unexpectedly
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug

<!--
actlint is deterministic: the same captured manifest always produces the same findings. Please
attach the manifest that reproduces the problem — it is usually enough to reproduce exactly.
-->

<!-- What did actlint do? For a suspected false positive/negative, name the tool and the finding. -->

## What you expected

<!-- The finding or behavior you expected, and why. -->
